pi_items.source: HTTP GET request - website returns 200 status and valid HTML
Task export script and task.json specification
Website analysis: 50 pagination pages × 20 products per page = 1000 product URLs. Crawling 20+ URLs is easily achievable.
HTML meta tag analysis of https://books.toscrape.com/: <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width" />
HTML link tag analysis: <link rel="shortcut icon" href="static/oscar/favicon.ico" /> - href contains 'icon'
HTML meta tag analysis: <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8" /> - charset contains 'utf'

privileged_info_summary: The target website https://books.toscrape.com/ is a real, publicly accessible website that returns HTTP 200. It contains 50 pagination pages with 20 books per page (1000 total products). The site's head tags include: viewport content of exactly 'width=device-width', favicon href of 'static/oscar/favicon.ico' (contains 'icon'), and charset of 'UTF-8' (contains 'utf'). All metadata claims about these values are accurate.
